query:
-- Enable invite gate
INSERT INTO invite_gate_settings (id, isEnabled, updatedAt) VALUES (1, 1, NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE isEnabled = 1, updatedAt = NOW();

-- Seed honeypot code (never share this one)
INSERT INTO invite_codes (code, label, maxUses, useCount, isActive, createdAt)
VALUES ('INTERNAL-MONITOR-7X', 'Honeypot — do not share', 0, 0, 1, NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE isActive = 1, useCount = 0;
